subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Let $X$ be a continuous uniform random variable on $[0, 25]$. Find the pdf and cdf of $X$.
explanation: The pdf is $f(x) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{25} & 0 \le x \le 25 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ and the cdf is $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & \text{if } x < 0 \\ \frac{x}{25} & \text{if } 0 \le x \le 25 \\ 1 & \text{if } x > 25 \end{cases}$.
